name: Harvard Apparatus Regenerative Technology, Inc.
summary: PART I . OVERVIEW Regenerative Biotech We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the development of regenerative medicine treatments for disorders of the gastro-intestinal system and other organs that result from cancer, trauma or birth defects. Our technology is based on our proprietary cell-therapy platform that uses a patients own stem cells to regenerate and restore function to damaged organs.
